str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - digital-literacy
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: The Importance of Understanding Algorithms
entry.summary: In today's era, algorithms have become an integral part of our daily lives, from the search results we see on Google to the recommendations we receive on Amazon or Netflix. However, the significance of comprehending these mathematical processes goes far beyond just finding the best product or service for ourselves.
